description.value: **Benefit:** You gain a +1 trait bonus on Survival checks and one of the following benefits. Gain a +1 trait bonus on Perception checks made at night. Gain proficiency with light shields. Gain Gnome as a bonus language. If you already have this language, gain a +1 trait bonus on Stealth checks made in forested areas. Gain a +1 bonus to damage on all attacks against creatures of the giant type. Gain Orc as a bonus language. If you already know this language, gain a +1 trait bonus on Intimidate checks.
